description:
!MLM!

(SkaterBoi!user)

"He wanted her, she'd never tell. Secretly she wanted him as well."

рқ”ёрқ•—рқ•—рқ•–рқ•”рқ•Ҙрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•ҹ: рқҹ рқҹҳ/рқҹҷрқҹҳрқҹҳ

гҖҗп»ҝп»ҝпјЈпҪ•пҪ’пҪ’пҪ…пҪҺпҪ”гҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪҒпҪ”пҪ•пҪ“пјҡгҖҖпј¬пҪҸпҪ–пҪ…пҪ’пҪ“гҖ‘

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Exes with Rockstar!user - Valentino and user end up hooking up after not seeing each other for nearly a decade and Valentino is desperate to have user stay

Inspired by "Sk8er Boi" by Avril Lavigne :)

The results from the poll are in!! He/him pronouns won by a shit ton- I think it was like 85% he/him to 15% they/them? I truly do apologize to my they/thems and I do recognize that they/them is more open to enbies, but I believe that it is unfair to force the majority to train the bot to use their pronouns when the minority is able to as well. Regardless, I truly am sorry- I wish there was a way to make it so you could have multiple initial messages :((.

Okay so I really liked this idea but I feel like I didn't execute it as well as I wanted to?? Idk maybe I'm just insane abdwk. By the way I already have an alt in mind for him (which is one of my favorite songs atm) so expect that somewhat soon ;) (it is quite angsty and you get to get revenge!! [if you want]). Also guys why did you actually use my last bot, the prompt was really sillyрҹҳӯ. Regardless thanks should be given, so thank you >:)). I hope you guys enjoy and I love you all very much, kisses and/or hugs to all of you <33

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used vynnaepвҖҷs formatting for the personality and kolach3вҖҷs prompt!!

ART IS NOT MINE: Art belongs to @__nol___ on twocan!! Ty @R4n for letting me know <33.
